textByHashes.7d365de203b963044d358bb98f0d9f8a2269a0e3: Hello there. Would you like to see the goods I have for sale?
textByHashes.ed2cd731ce27ff453ec857347270540146fd1322: Ah, I have contacts on the mainland. I have a sailor friend who brings me crates of wool on a regular basis.
textByHashes.39418ad0796ef2cefbf8c9d46ce56089faf5aaa0: Rope of course! What else can we sell? Fish would go off before it got so far south.
textByHashes.caef30d06860919bffbdc6a1bbc41df92f8c2507: Err, I don't remember the name of the place very well. Dreinna? Drennor? Something like that.
textByHashes.742e57f3f06523567762faf099a7230826047e78: Would you like to see the goods I have for sale?
